title: Reference Identity Double Frame Storyboard AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Identity Double Frame Storyboard AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image three-panel luxury editorial storyboard for a user-owned portrait reference for face identity, preserving the same elegant young adult woman with glossy raven-black bob, almond eyes, and deep berry lips. Subject: the same elegant young adult woman with glossy raven-black bob, almond eyes, and deep berry lips moves through a symbolic window-between-worlds progression from distance to interaction to prominence, wearing a teal satin off-shoulder sweater with layered silver jewelry with the same recognizable face and overall appearance from the reference. Scene: Emerald and midnight-blue editorial atmosphere with soft cyan reflections, shallow depth, dreamy bokeh, and a floating double-frame window-between-worlds motif. Composition: Fixed square 1:1 three-panel storyboard: panel one partially obscured behind the frame, panel two hand resting on the frame with eye contact forming, panel three confident close-up prominence inside the frame. Style: Ultra-realistic high-end fashion photography with luxury editorial storytelling, consistent identity across panels, polished skin texture, glossy hair, and cinematic depth. Color Palette: Fixed emerald green, midnight blue, teal satin, silver jewelry, soft cyan reflection, and deep berry lip accents. Lighting: Panel progression from soft dreamy light to cinematic mid-light to confident close-up glow, all within cohesive low-key editorial contrast. Signature Elements: a symbolic window-between-worlds progression from distance to interaction to prominence, floating inner frame, double-frame motif, three-panel progression, teal satin wardrobe, silver jewelry, and consistent close-up identity. Reference Image Policy: Use a user-owned or consented face reference for identity and overall appearance; preserve identity consistency across all three panels. Source Image Recipe: One clear portrait reference of the intended adult subject is required before local image-to-image generation. Restrictions: Keep all panels coherent, identity consistent, text-free, branded-element-free, watermark-free, and free of duplicated or distorted faces.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
